response.justification: Strong software engineer with 20 years of experience and current hands-on MCP/agentic workflow knowledge, but critically lacks the required 8+ years of production-grade AI/GenAI solutions. Resume shows only ~1 month in AI-focused role and no demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization—all core competencies for this staff-level position.
strengths: 20 years of proven software engineering across multiple companies with staff-level roles, demonstrating deep technical credibility
Currently contributing to agentic workflows and MCP infrastructure at re:cinq, showing direct engagement with the job's core technical domain
Strong TypeScript/Node.js backend engineering and AWS cloud infrastructure experience (CDK) providing solid foundation for AI system deployment
concerns: Only ~1 month of documented AI/GenAI work versus the required minimum 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions development
No demonstrated expertise with vector databases, RAG architectures, retrieval systems, or LLM performance optimization—all explicitly required
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or leading technical discovery sessions with stakeholders, a primary job responsibility

key_factors.factor: Current MCP and agentic workflow experience
TypeScript and cloud backend engineering skills
